text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since Sakura Chiyono O chose me as her trainer.
On a day off...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Hello.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yep! If I want to compete in the Derby, I have to work my body
harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, she's... always been my role model, and now she's entrusted her dream to me. I have to make it come true!
choice_data_list: I'll do whatever I can to help!
I'll do whatever I can to help!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to go run some more! "Three years make a peach,
eight a persimmon, and infinite belief a Derby winner!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meaning of her saying is lost on me, but I do get a strong sense of
conviction coming from her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I need to do more to support her dreams. Or rather, I want to do more. That desire has never been stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After finishing up some work, I stop by the riverbank again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Steady, steady... Fight!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Keep going, keep going!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast A
text_block_list.text: Hahhh!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast B
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: An underarm throw, beautifully executed! Well done!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast B
text_block_list.text: Aww! I thought I had a chance when she stumbled!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, you have to watch out for feints. If your opponent comes low,
be sure to watch your legs!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast B
text_block_list.text: That makes sense... Thanks, Chiyo!
choice_data_list: You sure know a lot about sumo.
You sure know a lot about sumo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wait, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My dad's a sumo wrestler, you see. So ever since I was little I've been
going to watch his matches, and...
choice_data_list: You wanted to try it yourself?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, no, I'm perfectly fine just watching!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But those two... and the others in the neighborhood Umamusume
Sumo Association, they're serious about sumo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A sumo advisor? Me?

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast A
text_block_list.text: Even if it's only once! We really want to get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Get... stronger...

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast B
text_block_list.text: I lost again... Being short is just an automatic loss, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! Being small means you can be more nimble. Let's see,
I think my dad taught me a few moves you could use...

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast A
text_block_list.text: Chiyo! I won my practice match! My very first win!

text_block_list.name: Sumo Enthusiast B
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! It's all because of your lessons!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Your hard work is what made the difference! Congratulations on the
win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
At first, I only planned on doing it once. But the more time I spent
with them, the more I wanted to help.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They were just so devoted... it gave me courage, made me want to do
better in my races.
choice_data_list: I get the same feeling watching you.
I get the same feeling watching you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Watching me?
choice_data_list:
Your hard work and dedication give me
courage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-no, no, I... I don't deserve that! I'm really not doing anything out of
the ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's just that being ordinary means I have to do a lot more than
everyone else and, yeah...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... if me doing that gives you strength, then I'll work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
For the dream I share with Maruzen... and starting from today, for you
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing Chiyono O reaffirm her ambitions, I feel invigorated yet again.
